features.name: assert property with clocking event and boolean expression
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement with a clocking event @(posedge clk) and a boolean expression in the property
features.snippet:
assert property (@(posedge clk) !(a && b && (c == d)))
  else $error("error message");

features.name: assert property with sequence implication and $fell
features.description: Code should include an assert property statement using the sequence implication operator |-> with $fell sequence function
features.snippet:
assert property (@(posedge clk) $fell(rst) |-> !(a && b && (c == d)))
  else $error("error message");

features.name: $error system function in assertion else clause
features.description: Code should include $error system function call in the else clause of an assert property statement
features.snippet: assert property (@(posedge clk) condition) else $error("message", var);
